(3) Set: Damage from your Claw, Rake and Shred abilities has a 5% chance to increase your Attack Power by 100 for 10 sec.

(5) Set: Spending combo points grants a stack of Primal Ferocity per combo point spent. Upon reaching 25 stacks, all stacks are consumed, increasing your Attack Power by 25% and granting 3 Energy each time you attack for 10 sec.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes. 
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 100 damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target. Only affects Elemental, Giant, Undead, and Mechanical enemies. 105 charges.

Use: Sets up a fishing boat. While on your boat you gain +50 fishing skill. Can only be used outdoors near a deep enough body of water.
Use: Sets up a traveler's tent. While under the cover of the tent you are resting and may gain rested experience. Can only be used outdoors.

Use: Creates a highly radioactive and unstable wormhole.
"Technologically advanced energy-matter scrambler. Insert a coin to continue!"
